summary: Completed targeted testing of Audix scanner mobile app focusing on the two specific bug fixes: master data persistence and reports loading indicator. Both bug fixes verified as working correctly on mobile viewport.
passed_tests: Login functionality works with admin/admin123 credentials on mobile viewport (375x812)
Reports page loads and shows correct stats (2 Locations, 4 Items, 85 Quantity, 4 Unique)
CRITICAL: Reports page does NOT show 'Loading scanned data...' indicator after data loads
Location cards in Reports show correct item counts (Retail Store Front: 67, Warehouse B: 18)
Master Data page loads successfully - Products tab shows product entries
Bottom navigation is visible with all 4 tabs (Master, Scan, Reports, Settings)
Navigation between Master, Reports, Settings works correctly
No JavaScript console errors detected during testing
IndexedDB initialization working correctly with mock data loading
Mobile viewport (375x812) renders correctly without layout issues
Data loading completes without persistent UI loading indicators
Master data persistence fixes working - no data loss warnings
